race.description: Lakes Electrical Peter Palmer Memorial Hcp (Bm70+)
race.comment: JUST FAMOUS (4) jumped a $1.60 favourite on resumption when making it a hat-trick of victories. The inside draw is a big tick for Nottle and the form out of his fresh run has stood up. Can extend her winning run. CLOSE AT HAND (2) ended his last campaign in good order and looks back in top form judging by his recent trial. Tsang's claim comes in handy as he carries top weight and with a good draw on offer, he can return with a bang. TWIST OF GOLD (10) is building into this campaign nicely, finishing 0.8L off the winner last time out. She boasts a strong third-up record and Faithfull remains in the saddle. There's plenty to like about her today and she can put her best foot forward. PRAWNS ELEVEN (1) can mix his form, but he showed last start he's up to this grade. Carries a big weight but has to be included on his latest effort. SCIENCE DEGREE (5) can give a bold sight despite the wide alley.
